use_cases: Display user profile pictures with automatic fallback to initials
Show team member avatars in collaboration interfaces
Render contact avatars in messaging or comment sections
Display author avatars next to content
Show entity thumbnails in directory or listing views
ai_summary: A lightweight, accessible avatar component built on Radix UI primitives with image, fallback, and ring support. Features rounded-full styling with secondary background fallbacks and customizable size via className props. Supports loading states with skeleton patterns and integrates seamlessly with badge overlays for status indicators.
